author: Erik Hänel
changelog:
2025-04-02 v0.1.5
 c Updated to work with v1.1.7.2504
description:
This package provides a pathfinding algorithm based upon a custom particle swarm optimizer. The convergence was optimized compared to v0.1.1 as well as the possibility to configure the algorithm using parameters as a key-value list.

Updated to be ready for the upcoming 1.1.5 change.
name: PSO Pathfinding
